heading: Omitted
label: 35 to 35n Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 35, 35 note, and 35a to 35n, which were enacted by Part A of , §§ 1–10, 12–17, , to 415, to be known as the “Vocational Education Act of 1963” were omitted in the general reorganization of by , , , which redesignated such Part A as title I of and, as so redesignated, completely reorganized such title I and authorized its citation as the “Vocational Education Act of 1963”. Such act, as redesignated and reorganized, was classified to section 1241 et seq. of this title.Pub. L. 88–21077 Stat. 403Pub. L. 88–210Pub. L. 90–576, title I, § 10182 Stat. 1064Pub. L. 88–210Dec. 18, 1963Oct. 16, 1968Section 35, , , , set out declaration of policy as to sections 35 to 35n of this title.Pub. L. 88–210, § 177 Stat. 403Dec. 18, 1963Section 35 note, , , , named sections 1–17 of the “Vocational Education Act of 1963”. See Codification note set out preceding .Pub. L. 88–210, § 1777 Stat. 415Pub. L. 88–210section 2301 of this titleDec. 18, 1963Section 35a, , , , authorized annual appropriations.Pub. L. 88–210, § 277 Stat. 403Dec. 18, 1963Section 35b, , , , covered determination of allotment to be made to each State of sums appropriated under .Pub. L. 88–210, § 377 Stat. 403section 35a of this titleDec. 18, 1963Section 35c, , , , set out allowable uses for allotments.Pub. L. 88–210, § 477 Stat. 405Dec. 18, 1963Section 35d, , , , set out requisite elements of State plan and covered the designation of State board and State advisory council, policy and procedure for allocation of allotment, qualifications of persons under the plan, arrangements with public employment offices, accounting and fiscal control, labor standards, and reports.Pub. L. 88–210, § 577 Stat. 405Dec. 18, 1963Section 35e, , , , set conditions for payments to States.Pub. L. 88–210, § 677 Stat. 407Dec. 18, 1963Section 35f, , , , provided for application of labor standards under the Davis-Bacon Act (now to 3144, 3146, and 3147) to construction projects assisted under sections 35 to 35n of this title.Pub. L. 88–210, § 777 Stat. 40840 U.S.C. 3141Dec. 18, 1963Section 35g, , , , defined terms used in sections 35 to 35n of this title.Pub. L. 88–210, § 877 Stat. 408Dec. 18, 1963Section 35h, , , , established Advisory Committee on Vocational Education.Pub. L. 88–210, § 977 Stat. 410Dec. 18, 1963Section 35i, , , , covered uses of allotments obtained under other statutes.Pub. L. 88–210, § 1077 Stat. 410Dec. 18, 1963Section 35j, , , , established Advisory Council on Vocational Education.Pub. L. 88–210, § 1277 Stat. 411Dec. 18, 1963Section 35k, , , , provided for creation and funding of work-study programs.Pub. L. 88–210, § 1377 Stat. 412Dec. 18, 1963Section 35, , , , authorized grants for residential vocational education schools.lPub. L. 88–210, § 1477 Stat. 414Dec. 18, 1963Section 35m, , , , authorized appropriations for work-study and residential schools.Pub. L. 88–210, § 1577 Stat. 415Dec. 18, 1963Section 35n, , , , prohibited statutory construction authorizing Federal direction, supervision, or controls of programs under sections 35 to 35n of this title.Pub. L. 88–210, § 1677 Stat. 415Dec. 18, 1963
